2335330.name: Uncle Kenny The Game
2335330.description:
Uncle Kenny The Game is a throwback 2D platformer with fun, fast-paced action gameplay and a variety of mechanics and weapons at your disposal. 

BASED OFF OF THE ANIMATED WEB-SERIES ON THE "MAGIK CHEESE" YOUTUBE CHANNEL!

  • Full Controller support

  • Fully voiced dialogue!

  • A complete 5-6 hour story experience unfolding over three distinct acts

  • A varied and energetic OST: Made mostly by me, along with a few tracks by friends!

  • Swingshot: a tool utilized by Uncle Kenny to swing his way through several areas while fighting off enemies simultaneously

  • Fun Shoot 'em up Gameplay: Which evolves as Uncle Kenny furthers his collection of weapons!

WHAT YOU MAY FIND IN ACT 2-

  • A Spooky New Environment: To explore and find secrets in!

  • Flamethrower Annihilate your enemies with a fiery touch

WHAT WILL BLOW YOUR MIND IN ACT 3 ON AUGUST 22ND, 2025 - 

  • TELEPATHY POWERS!!! Control enemies with your mind.

  • SKILL TREE!! Tailor Uncle Kenny's playstyle to your liking! Upgrade move speed, special weapon abilities and more!

  • THE JETPACK: Soar high above your puny opponents!

  • PORTALS: Test your skills with mind-bending puzzles

  • HOVER BIKE: Travel at unimaginable speeds high above the ground!

  • EXCITING ENDING TO THE STORY!! 

Note From The Developer: Thank you to no end for checking out my video game. Solo development has been an extremely fun and challenging experience. I have wanted to make video games my entire life, and hope this is good enough of a portfolio project to get me a job in the industry. 

I WOULD BE HAPPY TO READ ANY COMMENTS, SUGGESTIONS, OR REPORTS OF BUGS/GLITCHES EITHER IN A REVIEW OR STEAM DISCUSSION!!!! THANK YOU SO MUCH!!!
2335330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
